# Christer Hagen

Christer Hagen is a Norwegian serial entrepreneur and software developer based in Bodø, Norway. He is the founder of Codebase, a technology studio and angel investing arm, and of Not Another Venture Capital, a pre-seed angel fund. In 2026 he sold Docdir, his AI company for real-estate sales documents, to Visma.

## Key pages
- https://www.christerhagen.com/ — Home
- https://www.christerhagen.com/about — About Christer Hagen
- https://www.christerhagen.com/portfolio — Companies founded and backed
- https://www.christerhagen.com/portfolio/codebase — Codebase, technology studio and angel investing arm
- https://www.christerhagen.com/portfolio/docdir — Docdir, AI for real-estate sales documents (acquired by Visma)
- https://www.christerhagen.com/portfolio/sailsdock — Sailsdock, CRM for Norwegian sales teams
- https://www.christerhagen.com/writing — Essays and notes
- https://www.christerhagen.com/process — How I work
- https://www.christerhagen.com/contact — Contact
- https://www.christerhagen.com/brand — Brand kit

## Norsk
Christer Hagen er en norsk seriegründer og utvikler fra Bodø. Han er grunnlegger av Codebase og Not Another Venture Capital, og solgte AI-selskapet Docdir til Visma i 2026.
